text.title: Retrieval Drift Alerting — Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end example: corpus update without re-embed → Jaccard drift fires → P1 page → safer-mode gate engages.

example.title: Corpus rot detection
example.code:
# 2026-05-14: docs team uploaded new policy/refunds-v3.md but did not trigger re-embed job. # 2026-05-15 03:00 UTC: nightly drift compute runs against frozen baseline_2026_05_01.parquet
drift-metrics-2026-05-15.json: query-embedding-kl: 0.12 # within ±0.15 baseline = no drift retrieval-set-jaccard: 0.42 # baseline 0.78, breach magnitude = 3.6σ score-histogram-ks: 0.21 # baseline 0.08, breach magnitude = 2.1σ neighbour-recency-days: 142 # baseline 21, breach magnitude = 4.8σ
alert-fired: P1 (≥2 metrics breach + neighbour-recency >3σ) gate-engaged: rag.safer_mode = true # citations only, no synthesis on-call-paged: ml-platform@example.com 2026-05-15 03:04 UTC
runbook-action: - check embedding-job dashboard → finds 12 documents stale - trigger re-embed for stale docs → 18 min job - verify retrieval-set-jaccard recovers → 0.81 next compute window - flip gate off → rag.safer_mode = false - file incident postmortem → root cause: missing trigger on docs CMS
example.note: Demonstrates: neighbour-recency catches corpus rot that quality metrics miss (faithfulness still passes because cited docs exist); retrieval Jaccard catches the structural shift; P1 routing matches the dual-metric breach rule.

example.title: Query distribution shift (new product launch)
example.code:
# Day 0: ProductX launches; new query class "ProductX integration" appears. # Day 3: query-embedding KL = 0.31 vs baseline 0.10 → 2.5σ breach, sustained 72h
alert-fired: P3 ticket (single metric breach, sustained > 60min) gate-engaged: false (single-metric breach below P1 dual-rule threshold) ticket-content: "Query KL divergence sustained > 3 days — recontract candidate. Owner: ML."
decision-path: intent-distribution-chi2-p: 0.003 # significant shift → recontract trigger fires per acceptance-contract.yaml → ML team adds new intent class "productx-integration" → re-runs acceptance-contract step 3 (set thresholds for new intent) → captures new baseline window once recontract signed
example.note: Single-metric drift is P3 not P1 — sustained low-intensity shift is a recontract trigger, not an incident.
